# AI Context for @json-express/logger-pino

A high-performance structured logger for JSONExpress using Pino.

## Setup
```typescript
import { LoggerPino } from '@json-express/logger-pino';
kernel.registerLogger(new LoggerPino());
```

## AI Instruction
- Use this instead of `console.log` for production applications. It logs in newline-delimited JSON.
